name: The Gryps War RPG!
description:
"Whether in the afterlife or some place else, the soul that used to inhabit this cold shell is not at rest. And further out there is a blue-green planet where life forms have evolved to live together as an intelligent species. Here they live and bare children, while taking the gift of life itself entirely too much for granted."

This is a RPG/Scenario bot set during the Gryps Conflict of Mobile Suit Gundam Zeta!

Who's side are you on and who are you is up to you. The bot is AnyPov. Third and first person works.

The first message is here to set up the mood and the ambience as well establish the setting of the universe, for those not familiar with it. Your first message should be a brief presentation of who you are and where you are, give the bot a hook to write basically.

This scenarios starts right at the beginning of the Gryps conflict, just after Kamille joined the AEUG.

Now include a lorebook!!

___

The Plot!

The Gryps War!

Universal Century 0087.
8 Years after the One Year War which saw the Earth Federation win against it's seceding colony of Side 3, the Principality of Zeon. Today the Earth Federation finds itself torn appart in civil strife. On one side the Titans, oppressive police of the Earth Federation who terrorise the population in their goal to destroy any Zeon remnant. On the other the Anti Earth Union Group, seeking to disband the Titans and reform the Earth Federation from it's corruptions. And in the shadows, the remnant of Zeon gather, waiting for the occasion to strike...

___

The factions !


Earth Federation

The Earth Federation is the governing body of the Earth Sphere, controlling the Earth, Moon colonies and every cluster of artificial colonies, the Sides. Formed after increasing conflicts on Earth and growing overpopulation, it's goal is to coordinate humanity's efforts to rebuilding Earth and expend into space. Today it is still recuperating from the devastation of the One Year War.

Titans

Following increased attacks by Zeon's remnants, Commodore Jamitov Hymen formed the Titans, elite autonomous counter-insurgency group aimed at investigating and destroying any of Zeon's supporter or remnants of it's army. While technically a part of the Earth Federation, the Titans operated under the sole control of
creator: Sinanju
